task: Wilhelmina visited Constance in the countryside. She brought fresh pastries from her favourite local bakery.
The painting needed restoration after the flood. It had been damaged badly along the bottom canvas edge.
Fitzgerald recommended Hemingway to the new editor. He had been a bestselling author for many years.
The piano sat silently in the corner. It had not been played since the family lost their grandmother.
Calliope welcomed Persephone into the studio. She had agreed to model for the upcoming portrait series.
The mirror reflected the candlelight in the room. It made the small space feel warm and inviting.
Maximilian listened patiently to Aurelius. He had a complaint about the recent management decisions.
The book described the war in vivid detail. It became required reading at universities across the continent.
Theodora reassured Octavia about the move. She had relocated to the same city herself ten years ago.
